glosses.zh-Hans: 女店主; 旅店老板娘
glosses.yue: 女老闆; 客棧老闆娘
glosses.pt: proprietária de bar; dona de pousada
glosses.vi: bà chủ quán trọ; bà chủ quán bar
glosses.hi: सराय की मालकिन; बार की मालकिन
glosses.ja: 宿屋の女主人; バーの女店主

translations.es: La dueña del bar nos trae agua.
translations.fr: La patronne nous apporte de l'eau.
translations.it: La proprietaria del bar ci porta dell'acqua.
translations.pt: A dona do bar nos traz água.
translations.vi: Bà chủ quán mang nước cho chúng tôi.
translations.nb: Eieren kommer med vann til oss.
translations.id: Pemilik warung membawa air untuk kami.
translations.sv: Ägaren kommer med vatten till oss.
translations.da: Ejeren kommer med vand til os.
translations.ja: 女将が水を持ってきてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; marks the subject and agrees with 'Wirtin'.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; syntactic subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate; ditransitive, taking dative 'uns' (recipient) and accusative 'Wasser' (theme).
Personal pronoun; dative, 1st person plural; indirect object (recipient).
Common noun; neuter mass noun; accusative singular; direct object (thing brought).

sentences.target: Ich frage die Wirtin nach dem WLAN.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈvɪʁtɪn naːx deːm ˈveːlaːn/

translations.de: Ich frage die Wirtin nach dem WLAN.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə diː ˈvɪʁtɪn naːx deːm ˈveːlaːn/
translations.en: I ask the landlady for the Wi‑Fi.
translations.es: Le pregunto a la dueña por el Wi‑Fi.
translations.fr: Je demande le Wi‑Fi à la patronne.
translations.zh-Hans: 我问女老板要 Wi‑Fi 密码。
translations.yue: 我問女老闆攞 Wi‑Fi 密碼。
translations.ru: Я спрашиваю у хозяйки про Wi‑Fi.
translations.pt: Eu peço o Wi‑Fi à dona do bar.
translations.he: אני שואל את בעלת המקום על הוויי־פיי.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi bà chủ về Wi‑Fi.
translations.ar: أسأل صاحبة المكان عن الواي فاي.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de eigenaresse om de wifi.
translations.uk: Я запитую у власниці про Wi‑Fi.
translations.hi: मैं मालकिन से वाई‑फाई के बारे में पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω την ιδιοκτήτρια για το Wi‑Fi.
translations.id: Saya bertanya kepada pemilik warung tentang Wi‑Fi.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative, 1st person singular; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive; takes accusative 'die Wirtin' (addressee) and PP 'nach dem WLAN'.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; marks the direct object 'Wirtin'.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object (person asked).
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a PP expressing topic/inquiry.
Definite article; dative singular neuter; marks the noun governed by 'nach'.
Common noun (acronym); neuter; dative; object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Die Wirtin lächelt und wischt den Tresen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈvɪʁtɪn ˈlɛçəlt ʊnt vɪʃt deːn ˈtʁeːzn̩/

translations.de: Die Wirtin lächelt und wischt den Tresen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈvɪʁtɪn ˈlɛçəlt ʊnt vɪʃt deːn ˈtʁeːzn̩/
translations.en: The landlady smiles and wipes the counter.
translations.es: La dueña sonríe y limpia la barra.
translations.fr: La patronne sourit et essuie le comptoir.
translations.it: La proprietaria sorride e pulisce il bancone.
translations.pt: A dona do bar sorri e limpa o balcão.
translations.he: בעלת המקום מחייכת ומנגבת את הדלפק.
translations.vi: Bà chủ mỉm cười và lau quầy.
translations.nl: De eigenaresse glimlacht en poetst de bar.
translations.uk: Власниця усміхається й витирає барну стійку.
translations.hu: A tulajdonosnő mosolyog és letörli a pultot.
translations.hi: मालकिन मुस्कुराती है और काउंटर पोंछती है.
translations.pl: Właścicielka się uśmiecha i wyciera blat.
translations.el: Η ιδιοκτήτρια χαμογελά και σκουπίζει τον πάγκο.
translations.id: Pemilik warung tersenyum dan mengelap konter.
translations.sv: Ägaren ler och torkar av disken.
translations.cs: Majitelka se usmívá a utírá pult.
translations.ja: 女将は微笑んでカウンターを拭く。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine; marks the subject.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive; first predicate in coordination.
Coordinating conjunction; links two predicates ('lächelt' and 'wischt') within the clause.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive; second predicate; selects accusative object.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; marks the direct object 'Tresen'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'wischt'.

sentences.target: Später empfiehlt die Wirtin den Eintopf.

translations.de: Später empfiehlt die Wirtin den Eintopf.
translations.en: Later the landlady recommends the stew.
translations.es: Más tarde la dueña recomienda el guiso.
translations.fr: Plus tard, la patronne recommande le ragoût.
translations.it: Più tardi la proprietaria consiglia lo stufato.
translations.pt: Mais tarde a dona do bar recomenda o ensopado.
translations.he: מאוחר יותר בעלת המקום ממליצה על התבשיל.
translations.tr: Daha sonra mekânın sahibi yahniyi öneriyor.
translations.vi: Sau đó bà chủ giới thiệu món hầm.
translations.nl: Later beveelt de eigenaresse de stoofpot aan.
translations.hu: Később a tulajdonosnő a ragut ajánlja.
translations.hi: बाद में मालकिन स्ट्यू की सलाह देती है.
translations.el: Αργότερα η ιδιοκτήτρια προτείνει το στιφάδο.
translations.ja: 後で女将がシチューをおすすめする。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb (comparative of 'spät'); clause-level time modifier.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive; main predicate selecting an accusative object.
Definite article; nominative singular feminine; marks the subject 'Wirtin' in verb-second order.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Definite article; accusative singular masculine; marks the direct object 'Eintopf'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'empfiehlt'.
